results.title: Little fireworks from Diamondbacks in abysmal loss to Kansas City Royals
creator: Ben Bliklen, Burn City Sports
results.description: The Arizona Diamondbacks dropped the Fourth of July matchup against the Kansas City Royals by a score of 9-3 at Chase Field on Friday night. A rocky start and little relief from the mound doomed the D-Backs on Friday night as they dropped the series opener to the Kansas City Royals.
